result.stdout:
Worm Script Engine v3.3.1 - Copyright (c) Furniss Software 2026
Usage: Worm <command> [options]

Commands
  init           Creates a starting project
  build          Build a worm project
  test           Test a component in a worm project
  list           Show components of the project
  help           Show some help on a specific topic

Options
 -h  command   Help on command
 -c  filepath    Path to config file
 -d  api path    Path to write API to
 -v              Verbose logging (info, warnings, debug)

Worm Script Engine v3.3.1 - Copyright (c) Furniss Software 2026
Usage: WORM BUILD <path> 

  BUILD              Builds the current project, if it exists
  BUIlD [<PATH>]     Builds the named project. Project is defined in a PROJECT.wrm file

Worm Script Engine v3.3.1 - Copyright (c) Furniss Software 2026
Usage: WORM TEST CONNECTION

  TEST CONNECTION   Tests the database connection, based on the WRM file in the .wrm subfolder.
  TEST CONNECTION <scriptname> Tests the database connection, based on <scriptname> file
  TEST CONNECTION <path>       Tests the database connection based on the .wrm at the target location
